goals.name: Muscle Gain
goals.description: The Muscle Gain goal is designed for individuals looking to increase lean muscle mass while maintaining optimal recovery and performance. This pack focuses on high-quality protein sources and mass-building support supplements.

goals.name: Weight Loss
goals.description: The Weight Loss goal is carefully structured to help reduce body fat while preserving lean muscle mass. It focuses on clean protein sources, metabolism support, and appetite control.

goals.name: Strength & Performance
goals.description: The Strength & Performance goal is tailored for athletes aiming to improve power output, endurance, and recovery. This pack includes performance-enhancing supplements and recovery boosters.

goals.name: Lean Maintenance
goals.description: The Lean Maintenance goal is built for those who want to maintain their physique year-round. Balanced protein intake and nutrient support ensure muscle preservation without excess calories.

goals.name: Mass Builder Pro
goals.description: Mass Builder Pro is an advanced bulking solution combining high-calorie mass gainers with premium whey protein isolates. Designed for hard gainers who struggle to consume enough calories daily.
